items.excerpt: Aftermath gathers developer reactions to Epic embedding Claude, Gemini, and Codex as central to Unreal Engine 6 via MCP, finding widespread resignation and copyright worry rather than enthusiasm, especially among artists whose existing workflows are being sunset.

CD Projekt Red co-CEO Michal Nowakowski says fully AI-made games are 'incoming' after meeting a startup that can ship a complete game three weeks into prototyping, but questions whether that is really the path the industry should follow.

Game Developer's weekly Patch Notes column flags Sony/PlayStation's strategic pivot toward AI (swapping 'PC' for 'AI' in its messaging), alongside Rockstar's union legal setback and Final Fantasy tax incentives.
